channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Victor Willis, lead singer of Village People, dies at 74
item.description: Willis died after a brief but aggressive illness, his family said.

item.title: New dating trends like chalance and kittenfishing reshape modern romance
item.description: Dr. Bruce Y. Lee explains emerging terms such as chalance, kittenfishing, and hat-fishing, and how evolving language reflects changing dating norms.

item.title: Victor Willis, lead singer of Village People, dies at 74
item.description: Victor Willis, lead singer of the disco group Village People, whose hit Y.M.C.A. became a staple at President Trump's rallies, has died at age 74.

item.title: Phil Weiser projected to win Democratic primary for Colorado governor
item.description: Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser is projected to win the Democratic primary for governor in Colorado, according to AP.
